sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id UInt32, startDate DateTime, endDate DateTime, description String);
SELECT id, addInterval(toIntervalDay(DATEDIFF(DAY, startDate, endDate)), INTERVAL 2 DAY) AS extended_interval FROM test_intervals WHERE description LIKE '%interval%';
SELECT id, addInterval((INTERVAL 1 DAY, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), INTERVAL 3 DAY) AS complex_interval FROM (SELECT id, startDate, endDate FROM test_intervals WHERE endDate > startDate) AS derived_table;
SELECT id, addInterval(INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_intervals) DAY, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS interval_sum FROM test_intervals GROUP BY id HAVING id LIKE '1';

SELECT addInterval(INTERVAL (SELECT MAX(DATEDIFF(DAY, startDate, endDate)) FROM test_intervals), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) AS boundary_interval FROM dual WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_intervals WHERE startDate IS NULL) LIKE '0';
SELECT addInterval(NULL, INTERVAL 3 MONTH) AS null_case FROM test_intervals WHERE description LIKE '%interval%' ORDER BY extended_interval;
CREATE TABLE temp_intervals AS SELECT addInterval(INTERVAL (5), INTERVAL (3 DAY)) AS temp_interval;
SELECT temp_interval FROM temp_intervals WHERE temp_interval LIKE '%6 DAY%';
